headline: Musk to speak at chip tool giant ASML event ahead of SpaceX IPO

headline: Tesla Stock Rises. Is SpaceX Selling Pressure Over?
summary: Tesla  stock rose early Thursday after the order book for SpaceX’s massive IPO closed.  Coming into Thursday trading, shares were down almost 10% over the past week, leaving investors wondering if Tesla investors were selling stock to fund purchases of SpaceX shares, which are expected to begin trading on Friday.  SpaceX has allocated an estimated 30% of its record-setting IPO to retail investors, much more than in a typical IPO.

content.title: Tesla Stock Rises. Is SpaceX Selling Pressure Over?
content.summary: Tesla  stock rose early Thursday after the order book for SpaceX’s massive IPO closed.  Coming into Thursday trading, shares were down almost 10% over the past week, leaving investors wondering if Tesla investors were selling stock to fund purchases of SpaceX shares, which are expected to begin trading on Friday.  SpaceX has allocated an estimated 30% of its record-setting IPO to retail investors, much more than in a typical IPO.

headline: Musk to Address ASML Event as SpaceX IPO Nears and Terafab Plans Advance (SPCX)
summary: Elon Musk is set to make a virtual appearance at a technology event hosted by semiconductor equipment leader ASML on Thursday, where he is expected to discuss Terafab, his proposed large-scale semiconductor manufacturing project designed to supply chips for Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX). The appearance comes as investors await the pricing of SpaceX’s initial public offering, which is expected later on Thursday and could become the largest IPO ever completed.

content.title: Musk to Address ASML Event as SpaceX IPO Nears and Terafab Plans Advance (SPCX)
content.summary: Elon Musk is set to make a virtual appearance at a technology event hosted by semiconductor equipment leader ASML on Thursday, where he is expected to discuss Terafab, his proposed large-scale semiconductor manufacturing project designed to supply chips for Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX). The appearance comes as investors await the pricing of SpaceX’s initial public offering, which is expected later on Thursday and could become the largest IPO ever completed.

headline: Tesla Is Worth More Than The Next 10 Car Companies Combined
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is not worth more than all the world’s car companies combined, although this is often raised in a “fake news” sort of way. A more accurate way to make the calculation is to note that the figure is close to 10x, or maybe slightly more, in aggregate. The numbers are still staggering. ... Tesla Is Worth More Than The Next 10 Car Companies Combined

headline: Why Elon Musk is the 'king of big ideas'
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) is on the launchpad, just one day away from its scheduled IPO. TrueCar Founder Scott Painter — an early Tesla (TSLA) advisor who sold Musk his Bel-Air mansion in 2020 — discusses his first-hand experiences witnessing Musk's leadership and vision as he seeks to expand his corporate empire. SpaceX is expected to go public on the Nasdaq this Friday, June 12, under the ticker SPCX, with the space operator aiming for an IPO price of $135 per share.

content.title: Why Elon Musk is the 'king of big ideas'
content.description:
Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) is on the launchpad, just one day away from its scheduled IPO.

TrueCar Founder Scott Painter — an early Tesla (TSLA) advisor who sold Musk his Bel-Air mansion in 2020 — discusses his first-hand experiences witnessing Musk's leadership and vision as he seeks to expand his corporate empire.

SpaceX is expected to go public on the Nasdaq this Friday, June 12, under the ticker SPCX, with the space operator aiming for an IPO price of $135 per share.

TrueCar Founder Scott Painter — an early Tesla (TSLA) advisor who sold Musk his Bel-Air mansion in 2020 — discusses his first-hand experiences witnessing Musk's leadership and vision as he seeks to expand his corporate empire. SpaceX is expected to go public on the Nasdaq this Friday, June 12, under the ticker SPCX, with the space operator aiming for an IPO price of $135 per share.

headline: SpaceX IPO makes Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire
summary: Few business leaders have been as deeply embedded in popular culture as Elon Musk, the ambitious entrepreneur who has become a central figure in internet culture and amassed a fortune that has made him the world's first trillionaire.  At a time when concerns about inequality are high and public attitudes toward the ultra-wealthy have soured, Musk has managed ‌to retain a loyal following despite his stratospheric net worth and without the folksy persona that endeared other tycoons such as Warren Buffett to the masses.  While admirers view Musk's no-filter style as part of ‌his appeal, critics have accused him of wielding oligarch-like power, raised concerns about governance at his companies and objected to his increasingly partisan political interventions.

content.title: SpaceX IPO makes Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire

While admirers view Musk's no-filter style as part of ‌his appeal, critics have accused him of wielding oligarch-like power, raised concerns about governance at his companies and objected to his increasingly partisan political interventions.

headline: Tesla Robotaxi Rollout And FSD Expansion Test Rich Valuation Narrative
summary: Tesla launched an unsupervised robotaxi service across the Austin metropolitan area, marking one of the first commercial scale driverless ride hailing deployments.
